transforms: Matched Wikidata records to selected subdistrict GeoNames IDs.
Used Wikidata Arabic labels where they aligned with the selected GeoNames ADM3 record and geoBoundaries ADM3 shape.
Added Wikidata QIDs to matching subdistrict records.
Preserved Wikidata English labels as aliases when they did not duplicate the geoBoundaries canonical shape name.
reviewNotes: Wikidata matched 265 selected current subdistrict records. The GeoNames Damascus ADM3 row used for the Damascus subdistrict did not return a Wikidata item from this GeoNames-ID query. The six geoBoundaries-only records do not yet have selected GeoNames IDs and therefore were not matched to Wikidata in this import.
